basic_details.job_title: Telangana Anganwadi Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 190 Anganwadi Teacher & Helper Posts in Kamareddy District
basic_details.organization_name: Women, Children, Disabled and Senior Citizens Department, Kamareddy District, Telangana
basic_details.selection_process_brief: Merit-Based Selection + District Level Selection Committee Interview
basic_details.short_information: The Women, Children, Disabled and Senior Citizens Department, Kamareddy District, Telangana, has released Notification No. A/262/2026 dated 08-07-2026 inviting online applications from eligible women candidates for vacant Anganwadi Teacher and Anganwadi Helper (Ayah) posts. The vacancies fall under the Bhiknoor, Domakonda, Kamareddy, Madnoor, and Yellareddy ICDS Projects. This article covers the important dates, vacancy details, eligibility criteria, selection process, required documents, and the online application procedure exactly as stated in the official notification.

application_fee.details: The application fee details are not mentioned in the official notification.

qualification.education_qualification: Intermediate Pass (For Helper posts, SSC-qualified candidates may be considered if Intermediate candidates are unavailable)
qualification.details: Candidates must have passed the Intermediate examination. For the Anganwadi Helper (Ayah) post, if sufficient Intermediate-qualified applicants are not available at a location, candidates who have passed the 10th class (SSC) will be considered. | Candidates must be between 18 and 35 years of age as on 01-07-2026. | Applicants must be permanent local residents of the Anganwadi centre they are applying for. Rural areas: only candidates belonging to that Gram Panchayat are eligible. Urban areas: only candidates belonging to that Ward are eligible. For Anganwadi centres located in SC/ST sub-plan habitations, only SC/ST candidates belonging to that specific hamlet/habitation are eligible for both Teacher and Helper posts. For centres allocated to SC sub-plan areas, only SC candidates belonging to that Gram Panchayat are eligible. A residence verification certificate issued by the concerned Tahsildar is mandatory. Only certificates issued within one year from the date of this notification will be accepted. | Candidates must belong to the roster point (caste/category) specified for that particular post. If a candidate's caste category changes after applying, it will not be considered valid unless supported by a Gazette notification or court order. | The notification specifically allows the following categories of disabled candidates to apply: | Persons who can hear using a hearing aid. Blind persons who are able to move independently without an escort's assistance. Persons with hand or leg disability who are still capable of performing pre-primary teaching duties or taking care of children without difficulty.

salary_details.details: The salary or honorarium for the Anganwadi Teacher and Anganwadi Helper posts is not mentioned in the official notification.

selection_process: Selection will be made based on the following weightage criteria:
if Intermediate-qualified applicants are unavailable at a location
selection among 10th class-qualified applicants will be made in the same manner.
how_to_apply: Find the Kamareddy district Anganwadi recruitment online application link.
Fill in all personal, educational, and category details correctly and completely.
Upload scanned copies of all required documents listed above.
Applications will be accepted only through the official website. Manual applications submitted directly to the CPO/DWO/Project office without applying online will not be considered.
important_instructions: Candidates must ensure all details filled in the application are accurate and complete. This notification can be fully or partially cancelled or modified by the District Collector/Chairperson, Kamareddy, without prior notice. Only candidates matching the reservation roster point specified for the post are eligible. The notification has been issued with the approval of the District Collector, Kamareddy.

content_sections.heading: Kamareddy Anganwadi Vacancy Details (Project-wise)
content_sections.text: The following table shows the project-wise breakup of vacant Anganwadi Teacher and Anganwadi Helper posts as per the official notification.

content_sections.heading: Kamareddy Anganwadi Recruitment 2026 Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Candidates must have passed the Intermediate examination. For the Anganwadi Helper (Ayah) post, if sufficient Intermediate-qualified applicants are not available at a location, candidates who have passed the 10th class (SSC) will be considered. Candidates must be between 18 and 35 years of age as on 01-07-2026 . Applicants must be permanent local residents of the Anganwadi centre they are applying for. Rural areas: only candidates belonging to that Gram Panchayat are eligible. Urban areas: only candidates belonging to that Ward are eligible. For Anganwadi centres located in SC/ST sub-plan habitations, only SC/ST candidates belonging to that specific hamlet/habitation are eligible for both Teacher and Helper posts. For centres allocated to SC sub-plan areas, only SC candidates belonging to that Gram Panchayat are eligible. A residence verification certificate issued by the concerned Tahsildar is mandatory. Only certificates issued within one year from the date of this notification will be accepted. Candidates must belong to the roster point (caste/category) specified for that particular post. If a candidate's caste category changes after applying, it will not be considered valid unless supported by a Gazette notification or court order. The notification specifically allows the following categories of disabled candidates to apply: Persons who can hear using a hearing aid. Blind persons who are able to move independently without an escort's assistance. Persons with hand or leg disability who are still capable of performing pre-primary teaching duties or taking care of children without difficulty.

content_sections.heading: Salary
content_sections.text: The salary or honorarium for the Anganwadi Teacher and Anganwadi Helper posts is not mentioned in the official notification .

content_sections.heading: Application Fee
content_sections.text: The application fee details are not mentioned in the official notification .

content_sections.heading: Kamareddy Anganwadi Selection Process
content_sections.text: Selection will be made based on the following weightage criteria: For the Helper (Ayah) post, if Intermediate-qualified applicants are unavailable at a location, selection among 10th class-qualified applicants will be made in the same manner.

content_sections.heading: Required Documents (Scanned Copies to Upload Online)
content_sections.text: Date of birth/age proof certificate (SSC certificate) Caste certificate from Tahsildar Educational qualification certificate (Intermediate and above marks memo) Residence certificate from Tahsildar Disability certificate, if applicable Widow/spouse death certificate, if applicable Orphan certificate, if applicable Voter ID card Aadhaar card

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for Kamareddy Anganwadi Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Visit the official website: wdcw.tg.nic.in Find the Kamareddy district Anganwadi recruitment online application link. Fill in all personal, educational, and category details correctly and completely. Upload scanned copies of all required documents listed above. Submit the application before 25-07-2026, 5:00 PM . Applications will be accepted only through the official website . Manual applications submitted directly to the CPO/DWO/Project office without applying online will not be considered.

content_sections.heading: Document Verification
content_sections.text: Candidates who have applied online must appear at the concerned Anganwadi centre's ICDS Project office between 28-07-2026 and 01-08-2026 , during office working hours, with the following: Original documents Attested (Gazetted) Xerox copies - 2 sets Attested (Self) Xerox copies - 1 set Applications not verified with these documents within the given period will not be considered for further selection.

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions
content_sections.text: Candidates must ensure all details filled in the application are accurate and complete. This notification can be fully or partially cancelled or modified by the District Collector/Chairperson, Kamareddy, without prior notice. Only candidates matching the reservation roster point specified for the post are eligible. The notification has been issued with the approval of the District Collector, Kamareddy.

faq.question: Q1. How many Anganwadi posts are vacant in Kamareddy district in 2026?
faq.answer: There are 190 vacant posts in total - 95 Anganwadi Teacher posts and 95 Anganwadi Helper (Ayah) posts across Bhiknoor, Domakonda, Kamareddy, Madnoor, and Yellareddy projects.

faq.question: Q2. What is the last date to apply for Kamareddy Anganwadi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The online application closes on 25-07-2026 at 5:00 PM.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for Anganwadi Teacher and Helper posts?
faq.answer: Candidates must have passed Intermediate. For Helper posts, 10th class-qualified candidates may be considered only if Intermediate-qualified applicants are not available.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for Kamareddy Anganwadi recruitment?
faq.answer: Candidates must be between 18 and 35 years old as on 01-07-2026.

faq.question: Q5. Can candidates from any district apply for these Anganwadi posts?
faq.answer: No. Only women who are permanent residents of the specific Gram Panchayat (rural) or Ward (urban) linked to the Anganwadi centre are eligible.

faq.question: Q6. Where can I apply for Kamareddy Anganwadi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted only online at wdcw.tg.nic.in. Manual applications will not be accepted.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary for Anganwadi Teacher and Helper posts in Kamareddy?
faq.answer: The salary/honorarium amount is not mentioned in the official notification.

faq.question: Q8. Is there an application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application fee is not mentioned in the official notification.
